metadata.description: Multi-agent execution plan for integrating Challenges in DB, Post-Activity Reflections, Uniqueness Grading, and Phase 1 Sequence.

nodes.name: Database Schema Modifications
nodes.description: Create SQL migrations: hackathon_tracks, hackathon_challenges, hackathon_team_reflections, and add pgvector uniqueness columns (problem_statement, embedding, uniqueness_score) to hackathon_team_program_enrollment.

nodes.name: Database Content Seeding
nodes.description: Create SQL seeds: supabase/seed/hackathon_challenges.sql and replace Phase 1 mock data with the massive 16-step highly interactive sequence in hackathon_phase1_activities_complete.sql.

nodes.name: Types, API and Grading Logic
nodes.description: Update types/hackathon-program.ts, build fetchers in lib/, and implement the grading edge function mapping TrueFoundry embeddings to a 0-100 uniqueness_score via cosine distance.

nodes.name: Frontend Application UI
nodes.description: Build the React Native/Expo UI: Add Challenges CTA to app/hackathon-program/index.tsx, create app/(hackathon)/reflection/[phaseId].tsx, and create the Skia-powered app/(hackathon)/uniqueness-radar.tsx scatter plot.
